command: echo '=== MEMORY STATS ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT 'policies', COUNT(*) FROM policies UNION ALL SELECT 'episodes', COUNT(*) FROM episodes UNION ALL SELECT 'incidents', COUNT(*) FROM incidents UNION ALL SELECT 'solutions', COUNT(*) FROM solutions UNION ALL SELECT 'decisions', COUNT(*) FROM decisions UNION ALL SELECT 'contexts', COUNT(*) FROM contexts;" && echo '=== POLICIES ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT id, title, severity FROM policies ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;" && echo '=== RECENT EPISODES ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT id, title, status, datetime(created_at, 'unixepoch') FROM episodes ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" && echo '=== INCIDENTS (open) ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT id, title, status, severity FROM incidents WHERE status != 'resolved' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" && echo '=== TOP SOLUTIONS ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT id, title, verified, use_count, rating FROM solutions ORDER BY use_count DESC LIMIT 10;" && echo '=== DECISIONS ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT id, title, datetime(created_at, 'unixepoch') FROM decisions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" && echo '=== CONTEXTS ===' && sqlite3 /opt/claude-code/memory/memory.db "SELECT id, title, category FROM contexts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;"
intent: Memory bootstrap: полный обзор всех 6 слоёв памяти (policies, episodes, incidents, solutions, decisions, contexts)
